case_title: ROMEL ENTERPRISES, LLC VS. FUYUE HUANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, FUYUE JIANG, YAQIAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMEL ENTERPRISES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, FUYUE JIANG, YAQIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 478 WARREN DRIVE, UNIT 619, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94131 (SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY), LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100185730)
